member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Email.SesTemplateSeeder
member.summary: Ensures all required SES email templates exist in the AWS account. Called once at worker startup via . If a template already exists it is updated (upsert behaviour).

member.name: M:FSBS.Worker.Email.SesTemplateSeeder.#ctor(Amazon.SimpleEmail.IAmazonSimpleEmailService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FSBS.Worker.Email.SesTemplateSeeder})
member.summary: Ensures all required SES email templates exist in the AWS account. Called once at worker startup via . If a template already exists it is updated (upsert behaviour).

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Messaging.SqsConsumerService
member.summary: Long-running hosted service that polls the SQS booking events queue, deserialises each message envelope, and dispatches to the appropriate based on the MessageType message attribute written by SqsPublisher.

member.name: M:FSBS.Worker.Messaging.SqsConsumerService.#ctor(Amazon.SQS.IAmazonSQS,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{FSBS.Worker.WorkerSettings},Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceScopeFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FSBS.Worker.Messaging.SqsConsumerService})
member.summary: Long-running hosted service that polls the SQS booking events queue, deserialises each message envelope, and dispatches to the appropriate based on the MessageType message attribute written by SqsPublisher.

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.BookingApprovedHandler
member.summary: Emails the InternalStudent when their booking has been approved by SalesStaff.

member.name: M:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.BookingApprovedHandler.#ctor(FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISesEmailService,FSBS.Worker.Notifications.IUserLookupService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.BookingApprovedHandler})
member.summary: Emails the InternalStudent when their booking has been approved by SalesStaff.

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.BookingCancelledHandler
member.summary: Emails the booker (and optionally the admin) when a booking is cancelled.

member.name: M:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.BookingCancelledHandler.#ctor(FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISesEmailService,FSBS.Worker.Notifications.IUserLookupService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.BookingCancelledHandler})
member.summary: Emails the booker (and optionally the admin) when a booking is cancelled.

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.BookingConfirmedHandler
member.summary: Sends a booking confirmation email to the booker when a booking transitions to Confirmed and the price is locked.

member.name: M:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.BookingConfirmedHandler.#ctor(FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISesEmailService,FSBS.Worker.Notifications.IUserLookupService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.BookingConfirmedHandler})
member.summary: Sends a booking confirmation email to the booker when a booking transitions to Confirmed and the price is locked.

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.BookingPendingApprovalHandler
member.summary: Notifies SalesStaff / SystemAdmin that an InternalStudent booking is awaiting approval. Triggered by when the booker role is InternalStudent (booking enters PendingApproval state).
Notifies SalesStaff / SystemAdmin that an InternalStudent booking is awaiting approval. Triggered by when the booker role is InternalStudent (booking enters PendingApproval state).

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.BookingRejectedHandler
member.summary: Emails the InternalStudent when their booking has been rejected, including the mandatory rejection reason.

member.name: M:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.BookingRejectedHandler.#ctor(FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISesEmailService,FSBS.Worker.Notifications.IUserLookupService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.BookingRejectedHandler})
member.summary: Emails the InternalStudent when their booking has been rejected, including the mandatory rejection reason.

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.InvitationIssuedHandler
member.summary: Emails the invitee when a corporate invitation has been issued. The raw token is NOT available here (never stored); the email body is generated by the API at invitation creation time and the token is passed directly to SES via the InvitationIssued template. This handler fires on to send a welcome / confirmation email after the invitee completes registration.

member.name: M:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.InvitationIssuedHandler.#ctor(FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISesEmailService,FSBS.Worker.Notifications.IUserLookupService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FSBS.Worker.Notifications.Handlers.InvitationIssuedHandler})
member.summary: Emails the invitee when a corporate invitation has been issued. The raw token is NOT available here (never stored); the email body is generated by the API at invitation creation time and the token is passed directly to SES via the InvitationIssued template. This handler fires on to send a welcome / confirmation email after the invitee completes registration.

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.IMessageDispatcher
member.summary: Resolves the correct for a given SQS MessageType attribute value and invokes it.

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.INotificationHandler`1
member.summary: Handles a specific notification event type deserialized from an SQS message.

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.IUserLookupService
member.summary: Lightweight read-only service used by notification handlers to resolve user contact details (email, display name) from a user ID.

member.name: M:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.IUserLookupService.GetContactAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the email address and display name for the given user, or null if the user does not exist.

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.UserContact
member.summary: Email address and display name for a user.

member.name: M:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.UserContact.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Email address and display name for a user.

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.MessageDispatcher
member.summary: Routes an SQS message to the correct typed based on the MessageType attribute set by SqsPublisher.

member.name: M:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.MessageDispatcher.#ctor(System.IServiceProvider,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FSBS.Worker.Notifications.MessageDispatcher})
member.summary: Routes an SQS message to the correct typed based on the MessageType attribute set by SqsPublisher.

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.UserLookupService
member.summary: Dapper-based implementation of . Executes a single lightweight query against fsbs.app_users + fsbs.user_profiles to resolve contact details for notification dispatch.

member.name: M:FSBS.Worker.Notifications.UserLookupService.#ctor(System.Data.IDbConnection)
member.summary: Dapper-based implementation of . Executes a single lightweight query against fsbs.app_users + fsbs.user_profiles to resolve contact details for notification dispatch.

member.name: T:FSBS.Worker.WorkerSettings
member.summary: Configuration settings for the FSBS notification worker. Bound from the "Worker" section of appsettings.json / environment variables.

member.name: P:FSBS.Worker.WorkerSettings.BookingEventsQueueUrl
member.summary: URL of the SQS queue that receives booking domain events.

member.name: P:FSBS.Worker.WorkerSettings.SalesStaffEmail
member.summary: SalesStaff distribution email address used for PendingApproval alerts. Defaults to a placeholder; override via environment variable in ECS.
